candidate_lesson: When internal regime disagrees with or lacks external TradingView confirmation (0 TV signals), the 75% sizing multiplier should be a hard trade GATE below a consensus conviction floor, not just a size reduction — internal-only MOMENTUM signals with pair conviction < 50% are noise-dominated.
testable_rule: if external_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime == 'MOMENTUM' and pair_consensus_conv < 0.50: veto_trade() else if sizing_multiplier <= 0.75: proceed_at_reduced_size()
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
